topic: [Attached scene assets: Act 1 - Scene 3 [palace-exterior.png] | characters:  [card] /assets/pdf-characters/antagonists/antagonists-p08-02.png | charac
summary:
The user provided multiple scene and character assets, including `palace-exterior.png`, `bedouin-wonder-tent-grid.png`, `/assets/pdf-characters/antagonists/antagonists-p08-02.png`, and `/assets/pdf-characters/main-protagonists/main-protagonists-p04-02.png`, along with a "Batch 2x2 Grid Prompt Writing & Generation" skill. The user requested details about the skill's contents. The Assistant clarified that the "skill" is a workflow designed to generate prompts from a user-provided scene description, not a prompt itself.

The workflow produces JSON-formatted prompts for 2x2 grid generation, integrating with a shell script for PixVerse CLI batch generation. Each prompt details specific camera lens/focal length, depth of field, and precise lighting setups (key, fill, rim, ambient). Prompts also define emotional tone, atmosphere, cinematographic techniques, and quality boosters like "subsurface scattering, volumetric lighting, cinematic color grading, AAA quality 3D animation." For location/architecture prompts, `CAMERA LOCK` and `SET GEOMETRY LAW` sections referencing images (`@img1`) are included. Generated grids are intended for PixVerse models: Nano Banana 2 (4K), Nano Banana Pro (2K), and GPT2 Medium (2K).
